form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign fourth of 11 at Seymour Mdn-Sw September 11 over 1000m, soft track; 1.5 len behind Star Trip with 59.5kg at $8.50. On debut second in a small field at Pakenham Synthetic Mdn-Sw August 25 over 1000m, a nose behind Cheeky Contiki with 59.5kg at $6.50. Can be an improver this time in.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). Resuming. Finished off last campaign fourth of 11 at Seymour Mdn-Sw September 11 over 1000m, soft track; 1.5 len behind Star Trip with 59.5kg at $8.50. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the 600m, shifted out to improve and taken Strum wider.
Laid out under pressure over the final 200m.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 8th of 11 at Caulfield Heath Mdn-Sw on March 18 over 1200m, 6 len behind Ten Warriors with 59.5kg at $7. Previously second-up 3rd of 9 at Geelong Mdn-Sw on November 14 over 1107m, 2 len behind Smarticon carrying 59.5kg at $3.80. Suited here, can improve sharply.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid out rounding the home turn.

form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding making debut by Per Incanto out of Shanina. Purchased for NZD $ 260,000 (NZB 2024 Karaka - Book 1). Won a Pakenham jump-out on March 24. Looks handy and can figure prominently.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Three-year-old gelding making debut by Per Incanto out of Shanina. Purchased for NZD $ 260,000 (NZB 2024 Karaka - Book 1). Won a Pakenham jump-out on March 24. Looks handy and can figure prominently.

form.formComment: Third race start today. At debut, raced on the speed throughout before fading 7th of 11 at Stony Creek Mdn-Sw on March 8 over 1100m, on a slow track; 5 len behind Snakeinthegrass with 59kg at $17. Last start held ground to the line 3rd of 9 at Bairnsdale Mdn-Sw on March 22 over 1000m, slow going 7 len behind Mainmankash carrying 59kg at $31. Likely to find this a bit tougher and others appeal more.

form.formComment: Resuming after a lengthy spell. Only one run when ran last in a small field at Pakenham Synthetic Mdn-Sw on August 25 over 1000m, 6 len behind Cheeky Contiki carrying 57kg at $2.90. Expecting a strong run fresh.

form.formComment: At debut, raced on the pace before fading second last of 10 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on March 19 over 1100m, slow going 9 len behind Two To Tango with 59kg at $16. See again.

form.formComment: Comes off a 31 day let-up. At the latest run ran last of 11 at Stony Creek Mdn-Sw on March 8 over 1100m, slow going 7 len behind Snakeinthegrass with 57.5kg at $101. Before that second last of 8 at this track Mdn-Sw on February 1 over 1000m, 6 len behind Point Moon carrying 57.5kg at $101. Will need to improve sharply on recent form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early stages. Raced wide without cover from the 500m.
Raced keenly in the early stages.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. Finished off last campaign fifth of 9 at Mornington F&M Mdn-Sw November 10 over 1200m, soft track; 4.5 len behind Ravens Bay carrying 56.5kg at $21. On debut second last of 14 at Echuca Mdn-Sw October 20 over 1000m, 8 len behind Vangogh Bankcheque carrying 55kg at $9. Not out of this.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly making debut by Magnus out of Whitney. Won a jump-out at Pakenham on March 31. Expected to take some beating first time out.
